brand_voice_note: Warm, mom-to-mom encouragement that sells crave-worthy taste first and clean, science-backed nutrition second, always framed as one easy habit for chaotic real life.

concepts.primary_text:
The lunchbox nutrition battle? Officially over.

Protein Sips are a fruity drink your kids actually ask for, packing 9g whey protein, 3g fiber, and 8 essential vitamins into one easy sip. No thick, chalky shakes, no chocolate-vs-vanilla negotiations.

Loved by moms. Approved by kids. Zero sugar, no artificial dyes, and third party tested. 🍓
concepts.headline: Nutrition kids ask for
concepts.why_it_works: It names the daily friction every mom knows - getting real protein into a picky kid - and positions the fruity flavor as the thing that finally removes the fight.
concepts.visual_direction: The Protein Sips pouch lying flat on a sunny kitchen counter next to an open lunchbox, fresh strawberries, and a sliced orange.

concepts.primary_text:
Clean energy in, chaos handled.

The Get Up and Go Bundle pairs Support Sips for calm, focused energy with Veggie Sips for daily digestion - two single-serve pixies you can toss in your bag and mix anywhere.

100mg caffeine plus 200mg L-theanine means focus without the jitters or crash. Greens that actually taste like juice, and a routine that helps you feel better without changing everything.
concepts.headline: Energy plus digestion, sorted
concepts.why_it_works: The bundle's core promise is an all-day feeling - steady energy and easy digestion - so leading with that outcome speaks straight to the busy mom who wants results without a whole new routine.
concepts.visual_direction: Both bundle pouches laid flat and overlapping on a marble entryway console with a tote bag, keys, and a glass of water ready to mix.
